hero_subtitle: An AI program adjusted every week from your actual sessions, a human coach picked by sport and budget, or both at once. Switch setups whenever you want.
hero_meta: TRAIN · TRACK · EVOLVE   ·   EST 2026 · PARIS   ·   FR · EN
split_left_body: An AI program that adapts to your actual sessions, or a coach found by sport and budget. No six-month commitments, no mandatory €80 sessions.
split_right_body: Programs, athlete tracking, messaging — all in one place. And a marketplace that sends you qualified requests, no need to post three reels a day.
athletes_section_sub: AI alone, human coach, or both. Choose by budget and how much guidance you want — and switch later if things change.
athletes_f1_body: Describe your goal, your equipment, your schedule. The AI builds your program, then adjusts it weekly from your actual sessions — loads lifted, failed sets, RPE. Nothing like a generic PDF.
athletes_f2_body: Filter by sport, level and budget. Rates are shown on every profile — €15 to €500/month — and the first call is free. You commit to a month, not six.
athletes_f3_body: Your coach owns the programming and the key phases. The AI handles the day-to-day: load adjustments, deloads, reminders. Same data, same app.
athletes_strip: LOAD TRACKING · SESSION HISTORY · RPE & RIR · PROGRESS CHARTS · MEASUREMENTS · NUTRITION · TIMERS · OFFLINE MODE
athletes_testimonial_quote: I built 6way because I was coaching with a spreadsheet, WhatsApp and PDFs. Past ten athletes, you spend more time copy-pasting than coaching.
coachs_section_sub: Programs, athletes, messaging and client acquisition in one place. The marketplace fee stops after 3 months — no lifetime cut on your clients.
coachs_f1_body: Full exercise library, reusable templates, mesocycles and deload weeks, automatic progressive overload. Program once, duplicate, adjust.
coachs_f2_title: All your athletes in one place
coachs_f2_body: A full profile per athlete — measurements, history, photos, session log — plus built-in messaging and planning. You can close Excel, Notes and the scattered WhatsApp threads.
coachs_f3_body: Your public profile on the marketplace: athletes filter by sport and budget, you get pre-qualified requests. 15% for the first 3 months, 0% after — the client stays yours.
coachs_f4_body: White-label PDF exports — your logo, your colors. Your athletes get a document with your name on it, not an app screenshot.
coachs_pricing_body: Free trial, no annual lock-in. And the price doesn't climb as your client list grows.
system_sub: Six steps, one full cycle: you plan, you train, you measure, you eat in sync, you stay supported, you progress. The app covers all six.
system_1_body: A program adapted to your sport, your level and your gear. Built by the AI in two minutes, or prescribed by your coach.
system_2_body: Real-time guided sessions: timers, suggested loads, form videos. Built to be used between sets, phone in one hand.
system_3_body: Loads, RPE, RIR, weekly volume, progress charts. You know where you stand — not just how you feel.
system_4_body: Needs calculation, meal plans, macro tracking, recipes. Nutrition follows training: on/off days, peri-workout.
system_5_body: Messages, weekly check-ins, coach-athlete adjustments. And a community by sport and level, if you want one.
system_6_body: Progressive overload, scheduled deloads, regular retests. The program evolves at the pace of your performance.
why_1_body: Trainerize, TrueCoach, Hexfit: built for the coach. Fitbod, Freeletics: built for the solo athlete. None truly connects the two — and none helps you find the other.
why_2_body: The classic indie coach stack. Holds up to 5 clients. At 15, you spend your Sundays in spreadsheets instead of programming.
why_3_body: In-person stays irreplaceable for technique. But at €60-80 a session, few people can afford it weekly. Remote coaching makes serious guidance affordable — and helps coaches make a better living.
waitlist_body: Private beta this summer, in waves of 50. Coaches: founder pricing locked for life. Athletes: first 3 months free.
waitlist_legal: NO SPAM · 1-CLICK UNSUBSCRIBE · DATA NEVER SOLD
waitlist_success: You're on the list. We'll reach out when your wave opens.
faq_a1: Private beta from summer 2026, in invite waves. Public launch planned for late 2026.
faq_a2: Athletes: the core AI version is free; advanced features (coach sync, exports…) are paid. Coaches: free trial, then from €29/month.
faq_q3: Can I import my existing programs?
faq_a3: Yes — via CSV or copy-paste. We also support template imports from the main coaching tools (Trainerize, TrueCoach, Hexfit).
faq_q4: Does the AI replace a real coach?
faq_a4: No. The AI is very good at daily tracking, load progression and adjustments. For long-term strategy, technique and motivation, nothing replaces a coach. That's exactly why the app lets you combine both.
faq_q5: How do you take your cut from coaches?
faq_a5: 15% on the first 3 months of a client who came through the marketplace, 0% after. The client is yours — you can even bill them off-platform if you prefer. Our job is to bring you clients, not to collect rent on them.
faq_a6: European hosting, encryption, GDPR compliant. Export or delete all your data in one click. We sell nothing, and your training data never trains public models.
faq_a7: Yes, for the essentials: today's program, set logging, timers. Everything syncs automatically once you're back online.
faq_a8: Not yet. The project is bootstrapped by a solo founder who knows what coaching actually takes. The goal: a product that lives off its subscriptions, not funding rounds.
footer_tagline: Your coach. Your AI. Or both.
legal_mentions_content: 6way is a product of From6 Agency.
